creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 166625
patch to update sysutils/cronolog-devel to version 1.7.1

That svn diff that accompanies this pr(1) updates
sysutils/cronolog-devel from 1.70 to 1.71

That's it!

See port test output (QA log), and the patch file
to accomplish this, attached.

Thanks!

--Chris
